title: Lacuna: A Research Map for Machine Learning
abstract: arXiv:2606.26246v1 Announce Type: cross  Abstract: Lacuna is a research map for machine learning that uses LLMs to turn papers and scholarly metadata into markdown summaries, concept elements, research directions, and research proposals. Each item keeps links to the primary source records and papers that support it. We release the map with web, markdown, and MCP interfaces. Across LitSearch, Multi-XScience-CS/ML, and ScholarQA-CS-ML, Lacuna outperforms OpenScholar with the strongest gains on LitSearch retrieval (Recall@10 0.538 vs. 0.424 for OpenScholar v3). We also evaluate Lacuna Deep Research, a multi-stage report agent over the map, on 25 ReportBench-ML survey tasks: Lacuna Deep Research reaches 0.052 citation F1, 0.339 citation precision, 99 expert-reference hits, and 7.82/10 RACE report quality, while GPT-Researcher reaches 0.039 F1, 0.290 precision, 72 hits, and 5.24/10 RACE.

Title: Lacuna: A Research Map for Machine Learning
Abstract: arXiv:2606.26246v1 Announce Type: cross  Abstract: Lacuna is a research map for machine learning that uses LLMs to turn papers and scholarly metadata into markdown summaries, concept elements, research directions, and research proposals. Each item keeps links to the primary source records and papers that support it. We release the map with web, markdown, and MCP interfaces. Across LitSearch, Multi-XScience-CS/ML, and ScholarQA-CS-ML, Lacuna outperforms OpenScholar with the strongest gains on LitSearch retrieval (Recall@10 0.538 vs. 0.424 for OpenScholar v3). We also evaluate Lacuna Deep Research, a multi-stage report agent over the map, on 25 ReportBench-ML survey tasks: Lacuna Deep Research reaches 0.052 citation F1, 0.339 citation precision, 99 expert-reference hits, and 7.82/10 RACE report quality, while GPT-Researcher reaches 0.039 F1, 0.290 precision, 72 hits, and 5.24/10 RACE.
translated_abstract: arXiv:2606.26246v1 公告类型：交叉 摘要：Lacuna是一张机器学习研究图谱，它利用大语言模型将论文和学术元数据转化为Markdown摘要、概念元素、研究方向和科研提案。每个条目都保留了支持它的原始来源记录和论文的链接。我们通过Web、Markdown和MCP接口发布了该图谱。在LitSearch、Multi-XScience-CS/ML和ScholarQA-CS-ML上，Lacuna的表现优于OpenScholar，其中在LitSearch检索上提升最为显著（Recall@10 0.538对比OpenScholar v3的0.424）。我们还评估了Lacuna Deep Research（一个基于该图谱的多阶段报告智能体）在25项ReportBench-ML调查任务上的表现：Lacuna Deep Research达到了0.052的引用F1值、0.339的引用精确率、99次专家参考命中次数以及7.82/10的RACE报告质量评分，而GPT-Researcher则为0.039 F1值、0.290精确率、72次命中次数和5.24/10的RACE评分。
tldr: Lacuna提出了一种基于LLM将论文转化为结构化图谱并实现高效检索与深度研究的机器学习研究地图，在多个基准上显著超越现有方法。
en_tdlr: Lacuna introduces a machine learning research map that leverages LLMs to transform papers into a structured graph for efficient retrieval and deep research, significantly outperforming existing methods on multiple benchmarks.
